supportedClaims.title: Linux container live CPU/RAM
supportedClaims.wordingApproved: In Technical Preview, Hyperdensity supports live CPU/RAM up/down for Linux containers within supported Hyperdensity-ready shell profiles and safety gates, with no rollout/restart/recreate observed in proof paths.
wordingRejected: Hyperdensity supports production autonomous resource movement.

supportedClaims.title: Linux VM live CPU/RAM evidence-backed
supportedClaims.wordingApproved: In Technical Preview, Hyperdensity supports evidence-backed Linux VM CPU/RAM live adjustment within proven object-specific paths. VM RAM uses Hyperdensity runtime overlay through virtio-mem/QMP/QOM requested-size where proven, not generic KubeVirt memory template mutation.
wordingRejected: Hyperdensity supports VM RAM live resize through generic KubeVirt template mutation.
